## The gate

- [ ] `./verify.sh` exits 0 locally (paste/attach evidence below)
- [ ] No check or hook was weakened, disabled, or bypassed to pass
- [ ] If this fixes a defect, a regression test/check was added **before** the fix
- [ ] For changes touching 3+ files: a spec was written and approved first
- [ ] Commits use the declared identity (`06_git_identity` passes)
